description: You are a production coordinator at an independent film company preparing visual contact sheets and metadata indexes for tomorrow's edit session using raw footage files in /home/ga/Videos/dailies/ (scene12_take3.mp4, scene12_take4.mp4, scene15_take1.mp4, scene18_take2.mp4). Extract keyframe snapshots every 10 seconds (at t=0s, 10s, 20s, 30s, 40s, 50s) for each clip, saving them as PNG files organized by clip in /home/ga/Videos/dailies_output/frames/<clip_name>/frame_NNs.png. For each clip, compose a 3x2 grid contact sheet of 480x270 thumbnails at /home/ga/Videos/dailies_output/sheets/<clip_name>_sheet.png. Generate a frame index at /home/ga/Videos/dailies_output/frame_index.json mapping every frame (Schema: {"frames": [{"clip": "scene12_take3", "timecode_seconds": 0, "filename": "frames/scene12_take3/frame_00s.png"}, ...]}) and a production summary at /home/ga/Videos/dailies_output/production_summary.json (Schema: {"clips": [{"filename": "scene12_take3.mp4", "duration_seconds": 60, "resolution": "1920x1080", "fps": 30, "frames_extracted": 6}, ...], "total_frames_extracted": 24, "generated_date": "YYYY-MM-DD"}). A production brief is available at /home/ga/Documents/contact_sheet_brief.txt.
